lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਈ ਜਨ ਊਤਮ ਜੋ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤੁਮ ਮਨਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak seee jan aootam jo bhaaveh suaamee tum manaa |16|1|8|
lines.english: Says Nanak, those humble beings are exalted, who are pleasing to Your Mind, O my Lord and Master. ||16||1||8||
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
God is the almighty Giver of all peace and joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਭੇਖਾਰੀ ਜਨੁ ਬਾਂਛੈ ਜਾਚੰਗਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har daataa jeea jant bhekhaaree jan baanchhai jaachanganaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord is the Great Giver; all beings and creatures are beggars; His humble servants yearn to beg from Him. ||1||
Be merciful to me, that I may meditate in remembrance on Your Name.
and the filth of countless lifetimes may be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਗਉ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: maagau jan dhoor param gat paavau |
lines.english: I beg for the dust of the feet of the humble, that I may be blessed with the supreme status,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਰਘ ਰੋਗ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਉਖਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਿ ਰਾਪੈ ਮੰਗਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deeragh rog mitteh har aaukhadh har niramal raapai manganaa |2|
lines.english: The chronic diseases are cured by the medicine of the Lord's Name; I beg to be imbued with the Immaculate Lord. ||2||
With the Support of the One Lord, I have abandoned corruption, sexuality and desire.
With my ears, I listen to the Pure Praises of my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਪਾਇ ਲਗਉ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੰਗਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: niv niv paae lgau daas tere kar sukrit naahee sanganaa |3|
lines.english: I humbly bow and fall at the feet of Your slaves; I do not hesitate to do good deeds. ||3||
O Lord, with my tongue I sing Your Glorious Praises.
The sins which I have committed are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮਨੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਤਜਿ ਤੰਗਨਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: simar simar suaamee man jeevai panch doot taj tanganaa |4|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on my Lord and Master, my mind lives; I am rid of the five oppressive demons. ||4||
Meditating on Your lotus feet, I have come aboard Your boat.
Joining the Society of the Saints, I cross over the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਚਾ ਬੰਦਨ ਹਰਿ ਸਮਤ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਨੰਗਨਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: arachaa bandan har samat nivaasee baahurr jon na nanganaa |5|
lines.english: My flower-offering and worship is to realize that the Lord is dwelling alike in all; I shall not be reincarnated naked again. ||5||
You are the treasure of Grace, merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸਨ ਕੋ ਕਰਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਗੋੁਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: daas daasan ko kar lehu goupaalaa |
lines.english: Please make me the slave of Your slaves, O Lord of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਮਿਲੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਭੰਗਨਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sakhaa sahaaee pooran paramesur mil kade na hovee bhanganaa |6|
lines.english: Meet with your companion and helper, the Perfect Transcendent Lord God; you shall never be separated from Him again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਆਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arap dharee har aagai |
lines.english: I dedicate my mind and body, and place them in offering before the Lord.
Asleep for countless lifetimes, I have awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾ ਸੋਈ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਕੁ ਹਤਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਹੰਤਨਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jis kaa saa soee pratipaalak hat tiaagee haumai hantanaa |7|
lines.english: He, to whom I belong, is my cherisher and nurturer. I have killed and discarded my murderous self-conceit. ||7||
The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is pervading the water and the land.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮ ਭੀਤਿ ਖੋਈ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਏਕੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਰਬੰਗਨਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bharam bheet khoee gur poorai ek raviaa sarabanganaa |8|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has demolished the wall of doubt, and now I see the One Lord pervading everywhere. ||8||
The undeceivable Lord and Master is permeating each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਕਤ ਪੇਖਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ॥
lines.translit: jat kat pekhau prabh sukh saagar |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see God, the ocean of peace.
The Lord's treasure is never exhausted; He is the storehouse of jewels.
My heart is cooled, and my mind and body are calmed and soothed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹ ਅਗਾਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਰਪੰਗਨਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: agah agaah kichh mit nahee paaeeai so boojhai jis kirapanganaa |9|
lines.english: He cannot be seized; He is inaccessible, and His limits cannot be found. He is realized when the Lord bestows His Grace. ||9||
The craving for birth and death is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਅਮਿਓ ਧਾਰਿ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰਗਨਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: kar geh kaadt lee prabh apunai amio dhaar drisattanganaa |10|
lines.english: Grasping hold of my hand, He has lifted me up and out; He has blessed me with His Ambrosial Glance of Grace. ||10||
There is none other than Him at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਬੁਝੀ ਭਰਮੰਗਨਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aad madh ant prabh raviaa trisan bujhee bharamanganaa |11|
lines.english: God permeates the beginning, the middle and the end; He has subdued my desires and doubts. ||11||
The One and Only Lord is permeating and pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਿ ਜਪਤ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗਿਆਨ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਨਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur jap jaap japat fal paaeaa giaan deepak sant sanganaa |12|
lines.english: Meditating, chanting the Guru's Chant, I have obtained the fruits and rewards; in the Company of the Saints, I have been blessed with the lamp of spiritual wisdom. ||12||
The Guru is the Transcendent Lord, the Guru is the Lord of the Universe.
The Guru is the Creator, the Guru is forever forgiving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪੇਖਾ ਸੋ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo pekhaa so sabh kichh suaamee |
lines.english: Whatever I see, is my Lord and Master God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਬਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo sunanaa so prabh kee baanee |
lines.english: Whatever I hear, is the Bani of God's Word.
The beggar begs, and worships You in adoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕੀਨੋ ਸੋ ਤੁਮਹਿ ਕਰਾਇਓ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੰਤਹ ਤਨਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jo keeno so tumeh karaaeo saran sahaaee santah tanaa |13|
lines.english: Whatever I do, You make me do; You are the Sanctuary, the help and support of the Saints, Your children. ||13||
You are the Purifier of the sinners, O Perfectly Holy Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਦਾਨੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਆਨ ਮੰਗਨ ਨਿਹਕਿੰਚਨਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: eko daan sarab sukh gun nidh aan mangan nihakinchanaa |14|
lines.english: Please bless me with this one gift, O treasure of all bliss and virtue; I do not ask for anything else. ||14||
